flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Gulf Coast State College fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 (63.5% → 43.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Gulf Coast State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Gulf Coast State College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4k → 3.9k).
